message:
Running command: # The GPL-0326 error references the port that was just in the SYNTHESIS netlist
# The synthesis already ran and put reset_n_pad_a_esd_0_h into the netlist 
# The fix to wrapper.v helps for a fresh run, but we need to restart from synthesis
# to get a clean netlist without those ports.
# Check if synthesis netlist contains these ports
grep -c "reset_n_pad_a_esd_0_h\|reset_n_pad_a_noesd_h" \
    /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v2/03-yosys-synthesis/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v 2>/dev/null || \
    echo "No synthesis netlist at that path"
# find the synthesis netlist
find /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v2/03-yosys-synthesis -name "*.v" -o -name "*.nl.v" 2>/dev/null | head -5

args.command:
